message:
The other night, we had a surprise blackout that turned our cozy evening into a mini adventure. Just as I was settling in to stream my favorite show, poof! The lights flickered and went out. My first thought? "Great, there goes my phone battery!" I scrambled to grab a flashlight and power bank, but I couldn't help but chuckle at the irony of trying to stay entertained in the dark. 

I ended up pulling out some board games from the closet, and we had a blast playing by flashlight. It reminded me how important it is to keep our devices charged and have a backup plan for power outages. So, if you haven’t already, maybe consider stashing away some extra batteries or a power bank for those unexpected moments. 

How do you keep the fun going during a blackout? This little refresher helped me think ahead!
